name: foundry-connect
description: Foundry Connect pipeline lifecycle in Claude: the foundry-pipelines skill + /foundry-* commands over the Foundry Connect remote MCP server.

instance_url.title: Foundry Connect instance URL
instance_url.description: Your Foundry Connect BASE URL only, e.g. https://foundry.your-org.edu — no trailing slash and no /mcp on the end (this plugin appends /mcp itself). Do not paste the connector URL from Profile → Connect to Claude; that one already ends in /mcp.
